query:
UPDATE contacts c
SET c.deletedAt = NOW()
WHERE c.deletedAt IS NULL
  AND c.source = 'whatsapp'
  AND c.createdBy IS NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM deals d WHERE d.contactId = c.id AND d.deletedAt IS NULL
  );
